name: String Concat
description: Concatenates two strings with an optional separator.
python_code:
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode

class StringConcatNode(BaseNode):
    name = "String Concat"
    
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-START]
        self.add_input("str1", "string")
        self.add_input("str2", "string")
        self.add_input("separator", "string")
        self.add_output("combined", "string")
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-END]
        
    async def execute(self, inputs):
        s1 = str(inputs.get("str1", ""))
        s2 = str(inputs.get("str2", ""))
        sep = str(inputs.get("separator", " "))
        
        res = f"{s1}{sep}{s2}"
        return {"combined": res}

def register_node():
    return StringConcatNode
